title: Resize PDF Pages — Change Paper Size Offline
h1: Resize PDF Pages to A4, Letter, or Custom Sizes
description: Change the paper size of every PDF page to A4, US Letter, or custom dimensions entirely in your browser. No upload. 100% secure local processing.

sections.title: Why Resize PDFs Locally?
sections.content: Preparing documents for printing requires proper page sizing. Resize locally without uploading internal documents to the cloud.

steps.title: Open PDF
steps.description: Load the PDF with incorrect page dimensions.

steps.title: Select Target Size
steps.description: Choose A4, Letter, A3, or enter custom dimensions.

steps.title: Download Resized PDF
steps.description: Get your properly sized document instantly.

sections.title: 100% Secure Local Processing
sections.content: All operations are performed directly on your local device. We use advanced WebAssembly technology to process your documents without ever uploading them to external servers, ensuring complete privacy.

sections.title: Internal Documents Stay Internal
sections.content: Resize business reports and proposals without any server-side processing.

sections.title: Resize Hundreds of Pages Instantly
sections.content: Resizing a 500-page PDF takes under 2 seconds. All in your browser.

faqs.a: A4, A3, A5, US Letter, Legal, and custom dimensions.

faqs.q: Does content scale with the page?
faqs.a: Yes, content is scaled proportionally by default.
Yes, apply different sizes to specific pages.
Vector content is re-rendered perfectly; images may scale.
